zh.lifeSummary: Sybille d'Anduze於1177年出生在法國奧其坦尼加爾安度澤。她與Archambaud II de Talleyran Périgord在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1257年之後在法國加爾阿拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Sybille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sybil
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Sybille d'Anduze was born in 1177, in Anduze, Gard, Occitanie, France. She married Archambaud II de Talleyran Périgord in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 1257, in Alais, Gard, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Sybille d'Anduze est née en 1177, à Anduze, Gard, Occitanie, France. Elle a épousé Archambaud II de Talleyran Périgord à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1257, à Alais, Gard, France.

de.lifeSummary: Sybille d'Anduze wurde 1177 in Anduze, Gard, Occitanie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat in Frankreich Archambaud II de Talleyran Périgord geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1257 in Alais, Gard, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Sybille d'Anduze è nata il nel 1177 nel Anduze, Gard, Occitanie, Francia. Lei sposato Archambaud II de Talleyran Périgord nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1257, nel Alais, Gard, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybille d'Anduzeは1177年にフランスオクシタニーガードアンドウズで生まれた。フランスでArchambaud II de Talleyran Périgordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1257年以後にフランスガードアレイスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybille d'Anduze(은)는 1177년 프랑스 옥시탠이 가드 앤드즈에서 태어났다. 그녀는 프랑스에서 Archambaud II de Talleyran Périgord(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1257년 이후 프랑스 가드 알레이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sybille d'Anduze nasceu em 1177, em Anduze, Gard, Occitanie, França. Ela casou-se com Archambaud II de Talleyran Périgord em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1257, em Alais, Gard, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Sybille d'Anduze родилась в 1177 г. в местности андуз, гард, окситани, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archambaud II de Talleyran Périgord в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1257 г. в местности алеи, гард, Франция.
